problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
